narrative:
Precinct Tuscarawas Village (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 674 registered voters, with 60.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.2 percentage points.
